description.ko: 고도로 발달한 디지털 아티팩트와 흑백의 공간 속에서 산산조각 나는 흑요석 모놀리스를 통해 질서와 혼돈을 탐구합니다.
description.en: A stark exploration of order and chaos, featuring a shattering obsidian monolith in a monochrome void with high-tech digital artifacts.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Monolithic Singularity.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian monolith suspended in a sterile #FFFFFF void, captured at the moment of a controlled geometric fragmentation. The core erupts into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards frozen in time. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slice through the composition. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing mathematical chaos in a state of perfect digital suspension.
